title: filago pyramidata subsp. fuscescens
intro: Filago pyramidata subsp. fuscescens, also known as the brownish fleabane, is a subspecies of perennial plant in the daisy family native to Europe and Western Asia. It is used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, calming digestive issues, and providing antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of Filago pyramidata subsp. fuscescens can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally to support overall well-being.
